implementation_summary.summary: CP00-677 bridges the RP22 External Integrations I P04 primary implementation tail, secondary workflow slice, and permission/audit binding descriptors over 40 planned units from RP22.P04.M03.S21 through RP22.P04.M05.S16. It covers state snapshots, unauthorized count leak prevention, UI states, permission badges, audit hints, fixture/build/Hermes/Claude UI evidence descriptors, and extends no-write attestation validation across CP666-CP677 while keeping all runtime paths closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-677 RP22.P04.M03.S21-RP22.P04.M05.S16 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
